properties.evidence:
Because of scant evidence for those in need of intensive lipid lowering, SAE was examined across all trial populations

Abbreviations: ATP III=Adult Treatment Panel III (of the National Cholesterol Education Program); GRADE=Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation; LDL-c=low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; SAE=serious adverse events.

rejected_candidates.text: Ezetimibe plus simvastatin therapy is more likely to result in attainment of LDL-c target than higher dose simvastatin, based on 2 small trials.
rejected_candidates.reason: The text does not explicitly support a relationship between Ezetimibe and Simvastatin. The text discusses the effectiveness of different treatment combinations.

rejected_candidates.text: No evidence was available for other combinations.
rejected_candidates.reason: The text does not provide enough information to infer any relationships with candidate entities.
